_comment: The tumor registry the triage engine runs on. Add your own genotype here to make it appear in the tool — no code changes. Each mutation maps a label to its target protein, a wild-type reference structure (wt) and the mutant structure (mut), both as PDB IDs that must have docking scores in data/gnina_scores_replicates.csv. See docs/bring_your_own_tumor.md. Validate an entry with: python src/check_registry.py "<label>". triage.py falls back to built-in defaults if this file is missing.

EGFR T790M.note: single T790M; clinically T790M usually co-occurs with L858R -- see 'EGFR L858R+T790M', which is the resistant tumor and gives the reliable read.

KRAS G12C.note: apo (closed) pocket; non-covalent docking does not capture the covalent Cys12 selectivity that defines G12C drugs -- read with care.

KRAS G12C (drug-bound pocket).note: switch-II pocket already opened by sotorasib; other drugs docked into this induced conformation are often unreliable.

EGFR C797S.note: acquired resistance to osimertinib. Osimertinib binds Cys797 COVALENTLY, so non-covalent docking cannot capture the resistance this mutation causes -- read osimertinib here with the same caveat as KRAS G12C. Modeled structure (side-chain swap); lower confidence than a crystal.
